subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! The Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name must [appear] with a white hand of peace and tranquility amongst the people of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی جمال قدم و اسم اعظم با ید بیضاای از صلح و صفا در بین اهل عالم
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @war and peace
